queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the determinants of default associated with individuals lacking a formal checking account.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating effects of maintaining savings account balances below 100 DM on the determinants of default.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance between 0 and 200 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of credit risk drivers linked to checking account balances between zero and 200 DM and their contribution to default probability.
